definitions.text: Any object, act, state, event, or fact whatsoever; a thing of any kind; something or other.
examples: I would not do it for anything.

definitions.text: Used as a placeholder verb for any verb out of a set of related verbs. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: He wasn't cooking, he wasn't sweeping, he wasn't anythinging!
–I don't want to accompany him! –You never want to anything him!

definitions.text: In any way, any extent or any degree.
examples: That isn't anything like a car.
She's not anything like as strong as me.
